MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Trinity Management is present. Represented by Jackie Lopez.
Attorney, Daniel Bornstein, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Jacob Heim, is present.
Attorney, Aaron Farmer , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem A.M. Young, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 306A, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of OCT-04-2010 is vacated.
